data.content: Retake implementation on branch foolery-6a0d: changed the lightbox title row to an explicit grid with a reserved auto-width close-button track so the title editor only consumes the remaining header width, and removed lingering native input chrome with appearance-none and shadow-none so inline editing looks like the label itself. Updated the regression test to assert the grid layout and chrome-less input classes. Validation in /Users/cartine/foolery-6a0d: bun run lint (passes with one pre-existing warning in src/components/beat-form.tsx:368 about react-hooks/incompatible-library), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build. Playwright verification against localhost:3001/beats confirmed the editing input stayed clear of the Close button with overlap false and a visible gap of about 12.7px, while the computed input style reported appearance none, 0px border width, and transparent background.
